139: Begging your pardon, but I'm looking for a child─a small Xbr'aal girl. Have you seen her by any chance?

228: Oh boy. They, um...worked hand-in-hand to overcome an age of hardship, and in time...they built a peaceful and prosperous Alexandria─a <Emphasis>new</Emphasis> Alexandria!
